metadata.title: File Creation and Last Modified Timestamps in Status Bar
metadata.description: Dynamic display of file modification and creation timestamps in the status bar.

regex.target: text: "点击时循环显示时间戳"

regex.source: .setDesc("Turn the display on or off in your status bar.")
regex.target: .setDesc("打开或关闭状态栏中的显示")

regex.source: .setDesc("Compatible with Moment.js formats, e.g. YYYY-MM-DD H:mm:ss")
regex.target: .setDesc("Compatible with Moment.js formats, e.g. YYYY-MM-DD H:mm:ss")

regex.source: .setDesc("Enable cycling between the last modified and created timestamp on click in status bar.")
regex.target: .setDesc("Enable cycling between the last modified and created timestamp on click in status bar.")
